Home.title: Choose a secondary school in Amsterdam
Home.subtitle: Search schools with smart filters, map, bike-time distance and ZIP/location routing. Save favorites, share your profile, and score schools by your own impression.
Home.feature1Desc: Filter by level (including Praktijk), use map + marker popups, and calculate bike distance from your location or ZIP code.
Home.feature2Desc: Put schools side by side and compare what is important to you.
Home.feature3Desc: Save favorites, reorder your list, view My Score from your ratings, export a styled PDF, and share/load the same profile by ID.

Schools.zipLookupHint: If valid, zip code is used for bike distance.

Favorites.empty: You don't have any favorites yet.

Notes.title: Notes
Notes.placeholder: Write your notes about this school…

SchoolDetails.admissionsDesc: Admissions information is currently unavailable for this school.

Profile.title: Your profile
Profile.shareHint: Share this ID/link so someone can open the same favorites and notes.

SEO.defaultDescription: Find and compare secondary schools in Amsterdam. Available in Dutch and English.
SEO.homeDescription: Search schools, filter by level and distance, save favorites and build your ranking list.
SEO.schoolsDescription: Browse Amsterdam secondary schools and filter by level, distance and travel time.
SEO.profileDescription: Manage your school favorites, ranking, notes and shareable profile link.
SEO.feedbackDescription: Send feedback about the School Choice app.
SEO.guideDescription: Read how admissions and lottery matching works for Amsterdam secondary schools.

Impression.title: Your Impression
Impression.hasLockerForEveryStudent: Is there a locker for every student?
Impression.hasIndoorBreakSpace: Is there an indoor space to hang out during breaks?
Impression.hasProperGym: Is there a proper gym / sports hall?
Impression.buildingVibe: How's the general vibe / atmosphere of the building?
Impression.hasCanteen: Is there a canteen / lunch option?
Impression.canBringOwnLunch: Can you bring your own lunch and eat it comfortably?
Impression.foodPrice: Price of the food (from expensive to cheap)
Impression.homeworkLoad: Homework load expectation (from heavy to light)
Impression.hasChoirBandOrchestra: Is there a school choir / band / orchestra?
